name: 🔗 Integrate Your Favorite Tools in ClickUp
content:
ClickUp integrates with thousands of your favorite apps, bringing all your work into one central hub. Ready to maximize your efficiency? Let’s get started!
Here’s what to do:
 
Sync Your Google Calendar
Keep your tasks front and center by syncing ClickUp with your Google Calendar. Click the "Planner" with the calendar icon in your left sidebar and select the "Google Calendar" option to get started.
👉 Check out a full list of calendar apps you can sync with ClickUp
 
Explore Popular Integrations
Think about a tool you use daily (e.g., Slack, Google Drive, Gmail, HubSpot). Click the Settings (⛭) icon in your left sidebar, go to "App Center", and search for your favorite app.
👉 Learn how to connect all your apps in one place
 
Automate Your Workflow
Imagine tasks moving statuses automatically or emails being sent when a task is completed. While we won't set one up now, explore the Automations section (click the⚡️ icon at the top of a List or Space).
👉 Get a quick intro to Automations in ClickUp
 
Brainstorm in Docs
Head to your Docs (access it from your sidebar—you might have to click the "More" option to see it) and create a new Doc titled "My Next Big Idea." Start jotting down thoughts, and convert text directly into tasks!
👉 How to use Docs in ClickUp.
Why this matters:
✅ Centralized Work: Stop switching between apps and keep everything in ClickUp.
✅ Automate Repetitive Tasks: Save time and focus on what matters most.
✅ Seamless Workflow: Connect your calendar, email, and other tools for a unified experience.

name: 🧠 Work Smarter with ClickUp AI
content:
Ready to unlock a new level of productivity? Meet ClickUp AI – your intelligent co-pilot, seamlessly integrated into your workspace to help you write, summarize, brainstorm, get instant answers, and even take meeting notes right where you need them.
 
ClickUp AI learns from your workspace, providing contextual, relevant help across all your tasks, Docs, and conversations. It's truly one AI to replace them all, saving you countless hours!
Here’s what to do:
 
Write smarter, faster:
Click anywhere in the description of this task (or any task where you're typing).
Look for the AI button in the text editor toolbar (it appears when you highlight text or start a new line).
Select some text, click the AI button (It should look something like this: ), and try "Improve Writing" or "Make shorter." Witness the instant transformation!
 
Ask anything, get answers instantly:
In the top right corner of your Workspace, next to your profile, you'll see an icon that looks something like this: . Click it to activate ClickUp Brain from anywhere in your Workspace.
Ask a question like: "What's the purpose of a ClickUp Space?" or "How do I add a Custom Field to a task?" ClickUp AI will provide quick, contextual answers based on our knowledge base!
 
Brainstorm & generate ideas on demand:
In the comments section below, type a prompt like: "ClickUp AI, give me 3 creative ideas for a team-building activity for remote teams."
Highlight your prompt, click the AI button, and select "Brainstorm" or "Generate Ideas." Get ready for fresh inspiration!
 
Create Tasks with AI Magic:
In a new comment, type: "ClickUp AI, create a task to [your next personal goal, e.g., 'plan my dream vacation']."
Highlight the text, click the AI button, and choose "Create Task". Watch it transform your idea into an actionable item, complete with a title and description!
Why this matters:
✅ Save time: Automate writing, editing, and task creation.
✅ Work smarter: Get instant, contextual answers anywhere.
✅ Keep moving: No switching tabs—AI is built right in.

name: 🚀 Set up Your Tasks in Just 5 Minutes
content:
We're thrilled to have you here. This quick-start task will help you set up your Workspace for maximum productivity—fast. Let’s get started!
Here's what to do:
 
Meet your first task:
You're looking at it right now. Notice the due date (that’s tomorrow!), assignee (that’s you!), and priority (we’ve set this one as "High" to get you going!).
 
Update your status:
See the "To Do" status at the top? Click it and change it to "In Progress" to keep everyone (including you!) updated on your work.
 
Add a subtask:
Break down big tasks into smaller, manageable steps. Click the "Subtask" tab below this task description, click "+ Add Task" and name it "Learn about my Inbox".
 
Mark this task complete!
When you’ve done the above, change the statuses of this task and the subtask you created to "Complete". You’ll feel a tiny rush of productivity!
Why this matters:
✅ Stay organized: Keep track of what needs to be done and by when.
✅ Gain clarity: See exactly what’s expected of you.
✅ Boost focus: Break down big goals into actionable steps.
 
 
For a bit more on tasks, check out this quick video walkthrough:

name: 🎨 Design a Workflow That Works for You
content:
ClickUp’s flexibility lets you to create a Workspace that fits your unique workflow. Ready to customize your experience? Follow these simple steps to unlock the full potential of ClickUp:
Here’s what to do:
 
Personalize your statuses
Every List in ClickUp comes with customizable statuses. Click the current status of this task, then select the Settings icon (⚙︎) to make changes. Add a new status like "Awaiting Review" or "Ready for Launch" to track your process.
👉 Learn more about ClickUp statuses

Add a Custom Field
Track the details that matter most with Custom Fields. For this task, scroll down to the "Add fields" button and click the "+" icon. Add a "Text" Custom Field named "Project Lead" and enter your name.
👉 All about Custom Fields

Switch views
See your tasks your way! Exit this task, click the "List" view at the top of your screen and switch to "Board" or "Calendar" view for a fresh perspective.
👉 Explore all ClickUp views 

Create a New List
Organize your work by creating a new List. Exit this task, hover over your current Space or Folder in the left sidebar, click the "+" icon, and select "New List." Name it something relevant, like "My Projects" or "Marketing Campaigns."

Why this matters:
✅ Adapt to your needs: ClickUp molds to your process, not the other way around.
✅ Track anything: Custom Fields ensure you capture all the critical details.
✅ Work your way: Different views help you see your tasks the way you think.

name: 📥 Import Your Work into ClickUp
content:
You don’t have to start from scratch in ClickUp. If you already have work tracked elsewhere, you can import tasks, documents, and chat channels in just a few steps and keep your projects moving.
Here’s what to do:
 
Decide what you want to bring into ClickUp
Import tasks from spreadsheets, monday.com, Notion, Trello, and more.
Import documents from local files, Notion, and Confluence.
Import chat channels and invite users directly from Slack.
👉 Learn more about all the tools you can import from
Open ClickUp’s import tools
Click your Workspace avatar (top left) and go to Settings.
In the left sidebar, select Imports / Exports.
If you don’t see Imports / Exports, you may need an admin to enable import permissions for you.
Select where you want to import from.
Follow the guided import process
ClickUp will walk you through the import step by step.
Once it’s done, your work will be in ClickUp so you can continue without a hitch.
Why this matters:
✅ Move faster: Bring your existing work over instead of recreating it.
✅ Preserve history: Keep your context and past activity.
✅ Centralize data: Bring everything into one place in ClickUp.

name: 🤝 Bring Your Team Onboard in Minutes
content:
ClickUp truly shines when you collaborate with your team! Supercharge your productivity with these simple steps to bring your colleagues into your workspace and start working together effortlessly.
Here’s what to do:
 
Invite a teammate (or two!):
Click the "Invite" button in the bottom left hand side of your sidebar. Send an invite to at least one colleague. They'll instantly get access to your workspace and this task!
👉 How to invite your team to ClickUp

Mention a teammate in a comment:
In the comments section below, type "@" followed by your teammate's name (or your own if you're testing). This will send them a notification and draw their attention to your comment.

Assign a comment as an action item:
Reply to your comment (or a new one), and click the "Assign Comment" icon (looks like a person with a checkmark) to turn it into an actionable item for yourself or a teammate.
 
Share this task:
Click the "Share" button at the top right of this task. Explore the sharing options – you can share this task with external guests or get a public link!
👉 Learn more about public sharing
Why This Matters:
✅ Unified Communication: Keep all project discussions in one place, linked to your work.
✅ Clear Ownership: Assign comments and tasks to ensure nothing falls through the cracks.
✅ Faster Feedback: Get quick responses and approvals from stakeholders.
